details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level governance directories: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/, reports/audit/, reports/board/.
reports/board/ directory is missing. memory_bank/ and .cursor/automations/ (with README + specs) and reports/audit/ are present.
Deprecated directory moltbot/ exists at top level with active Python code: board.py, sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py.

Moltbot/Clawdbot references found in code/config (excluding reports/audit and docs documenting removal): moltbot/board.py, moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. JSON references also found in board/eod/out/ and reports/daily/ evidence files.
